name: Rhubarb-Pecan Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all the dry ingredients: flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. In another bowl, beat the egg and oil until well combined. Gradually add orange juice to the mixture.
3. Add the orange juice and pecans to the dry ingredient mixture, stirring until just incorporated.
4. Gently fold in the chopped rhubarb.
5. Pour the batter into a greased muffin tin and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the muffins to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
